notes: First spine run. Outline (10 chapters c0–c9, hint-coin vocabulary alignment with flags, umbrella Monte d'Or for unnameable spans) and the prologue+ch1 sample (≤4-line clusters, bookkeeping beats kept) approved by Pierre 2026-07-07.

Convention: a 'Move to X' line is the closing beat of the visit it leaves; the next visit starts on arrival. 'Move Back' chains were resolved by walking the visit stack; landings are corroborated by reverse edges and the hint-coin list order (e.g. Knickknack Alley Part 2).

Akbadain (c6) is split into levels B1–B7 from the walkthrough vocabulary; only the B1→B2 transition is explicit in the route ('Move to the next Floor (B2)'). B3–B7 boundaries are inferred from exit/stairs/door markers and mechanic changes (rock pushes → mummy chambers → tilt bridge → dig-facing controls) and their first steps are flagged.
Reunion Inn rooms (c7) are route-native: the route navigates by 'Tap on Office/Emerald Suite/Conservatory/Grand Hall/Auditorium' — no alignment needed.
Inline puzzle-solution lines (9 route actions) are omitted from keywords AND detail per Pierre's spoiler-free rule; they remain in layers/data.json. Each such step is flagged.
No missables (the manual's Puzzle Palace catches lost puzzles; story puzzles are forced; the guide is any%) and no achievementRefs (no RA set for 3DS).
No location mapImage anywhere: the extract-data pass emitted no images catalog (no standalone image assets in the snapshots).
Visit numbering k in v-<loc>-k is the k-th visit to that location across the whole spine, in route order.
